LanguageData.Apostasy_Despicable.description: Being coerced or otherwise manipulated into following a different belief is a despicable act. If somebody seeks knowledge of another's faith, then let them ask for it naturally.
LanguageData.Apostasy_Despicable.label: despicable
LanguageData.VFEA_BeingRecruited_Forbidden.descriptio: We should never allow ourselves to be recruited by another faction.
LanguageData.VFEA_BeingRecruited_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VFEA_Recruiting_Forbidden.description: It is wrong to accept any outsiders into our ranks.
LanguageData.VFEA_Recruiting_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.description: Spirits, booze, sauce, whatever you call it, we desire it. At least an occasional drink should be encouraged and we shouldnâ€™t even think of sobriety.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.label: demanded
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.description: Drinking is just plain fun, though not in excess.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_MildAbstinence.description: Alcohol is okay when consumed in small dosages, but it is better to stay away from it as long as possible.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_MildAbstinence.label: mild abstinence
LanguageData.VME_Anonymity_Required.description: Histrionic tendencies are despicable, through true anonymity we can achieve things thought unfathomable. For the betterment of yourself and your brothers in faith, keep your voice to a whisper and your face covered.
LanguageData.VME_Anonymity_Required.label: required
LanguageData.VME_Apostasy_Accepted.description: We feel bound by authority alone to follow our current ideology, and will not think twice if an opportunity presents itself to change our ways.
LanguageData.VME_Apostasy_Accepted.label: accepted
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Amazing.description: Auroras are a beautiful respite from the absolute darkness.
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Amazing.label: amazing
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Despised.description: The blinding lights in the heavens give us a nasty headache.
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_AutomationEfficiency_Decreased.descr:
Advanced machines and automated factories are to be shunned, for they detract from the exquisiteness of artisanal work.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Electric work table speed: -50%.
 - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Mechanoids factories speed: -25%.
LanguageData.VME_AutomationEfficiency_Decreased.label: decreased
LanguageData.VME_AutomationEfficiency_Increased.descr:
From the woodwork of a simple bow to grand factoriums, a craftmaster knows how to craft with efficiency.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Electric work table speed: +50%.
 - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Mechanoids factories speed: +25%.
LanguageData.VME_AutomationEfficiency_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_AutonomousWeapons_Accepted.descripti: Automated defenses are a good way to defend our colony.
LanguageData.VME_AutonomousWeapons_Accepted.label: accepted
LanguageData.VME_AutonomousWeapons_Exalted.descriptio: Automated defenses are key to a proper defense of what is ours.
LanguageData.VME_AutonomousWeapons_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_BodyMod_OnlyBiological.description: Flesh only should be replaced by flesh, to replace a body with a machine is forbidden.
LanguageData.VME_BodyMod_OnlyBiological.label: only biological
LanguageData.VME_BonfirePrecept.label: bonfire
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.description: There is nothing that would make us happier than acquiring exquisite tomes of knowledge for our colony.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Desired.description: Itâ€™s important to soak up every bit of information we can, how else are we supposed to learn? Most books are even quite entertaining to boot.
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Disliked.description: Reading is just such a chore. We retain nothing from it.
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_BookReadingSpeed_Decreased.descripti: Reading is not something that can be rushed. It is important to spend a lot of time on each page, absorbing all the little details.
LanguageData.VME_BookReadingSpeed_Decreased.label: decreased
LanguageData.VME_BookReadingSpeed_Increased.descripti: Books are an open window to a world filled with wonders. We love reading and will quickly devour any text we come across.
LanguageData.VME_BookReadingSpeed_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Disliked.description: Why write down what can be taught much quicker semantically or through trial and error? What an absolute waste of time.
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Exalted.description: Passing on one's knowledge is a purely respectful act. The authors of this world and their heirs shall be the ones to inherit it and all of itâ€™s fruits.
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_BookWritingSpeed_Decreased.descripti: Writing is a chore, something that wastes time and requires a huge effort.
LanguageData.VME_BookWritingSpeed_Decreased.label: decreased
LanguageData.VME_BookWritingSpeed_Increased.descripti: Writing comes naturally to us, and we do it fast and efficiently.
LanguageData.VME_BookWritingSpeed_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_CeremonialSuicidePrecept.label: ceremonial suicide
LanguageData.VME_Corruption_Essential.description: It is by the hand of an omniscient and all-powerful ancient god that we are threatened. Let us partake in an ever-obscuring, ritualistic way of life, that it may shield us from such baneful judgements.
LanguageData.VME_Corruption_Essential.label: essential
LanguageData.VME_CraftingQuality_Decreased.descriptio:
We don't care about artisanal work. Why create something when you can buy it or steal it from others?

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Decreases quality of items created on a worktable by 1, down to Awful.
LanguageData.VME_CraftingQuality_Decreased.label: decreased
LanguageData.VME_CraftingQuality_Increased.descriptio:
We pride ourselves in our work, and take no shortcuts in achieving perfection.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Increases quality of items created on a worktable by 1, up to Legendary.
LanguageData.VME_CraftingQuality_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_FasterForManual.descri:
Manual labour is our expertise and we enjoy engaging in it.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Non-electric work table speed: x125%.
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_FasterForManual.label: faster for manual
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_Slower.description: A craftmaster must never rush, lest the quality of the product suffer.
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_Slower.label: slower
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_SlowerForManual.descri:
Manual processes are unefficient. We can't waste our precious lives toiling away in mindless manual labour.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Non-electric work table speed: -25%.
LanguageData.VME_CraftingSpeed_SlowerForManual.label: slower for manual
LanguageData.VME_Darklight_NormalPreferred.descriptio: Darklight is an unnatural and cheap imitation of the miracle that is light, and should be avoided.
LanguageData.VME_Darklight_NormalPreferred.label: normal preferred
LanguageData.VME_DarknessCombat_Despised.description: Beyond being difficult to fight in, bloodshed should never take place in darkness, lest the enemy be spared peering into your eyes before you end their lives.
LanguageData.VME_DarknessCombat_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Death_DontCare.description:
Death is inevitable, should we lose an ally or slay an enemy it is not to be thought about.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists won't get any mood effects for losing other colonists.
LanguageData.VME_Death_DontCare.label: extremely irrelevant
LanguageData.VME_Death_Normal.description: Death is inevitable, an incredibly sad fact of life.
LanguageData.VME_Death_Normal.label: normal
LanguageData.VME_Death_Troubling.description: Death is inevitable, but we prefer not to dwell on it and not be reminded of its reality as much as possible.
LanguageData.VME_Death_Troubling.label: troubling
LanguageData.VME_Defeat_Dishonorable.description:
Suffering a setback on the battlefield is an insult to body, mind, and spirit.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - A colonist that is downed in combat by a humanlike enemy twice in less than 30 days will start requiring a ceremonial suicide ritual to cleanse his dishonor. Mechanoids and animals don't count for this.
LanguageData.VME_Defeat_Dishonorable.label: dishonorable
LanguageData.VME_DivineStarsPrecept.label: divine the stars
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Disliked.description: We'd rather not do cleaning and hauling tasks, as they are incredibly exhausting, but they are necessary.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Exalted.description: An aching body is to be revered. Nearly nothing is found more rewarding than a day of hard work.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Horrible.description:
We should not suffer the laborious degradation of our bodies, nor the degradation of sweat forming on our brow.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Leader and Moralist roles will be incapable of Dumb Labor.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Horrible.label: horrible
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Indifferent.description: Dumb tasks are necessary. That's all there is to it.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Indifferent.label: indifferent
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Liked.description: Hard work is good for your body and for your mind.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Liked.label: liked
LanguageData.VME_Eclipse_Despised.description: Eclipses are scary, a preternatural darkness bloating the light of the sun.
LanguageData.VME_Eclipse_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Despised.description: What is this, a retirement home? Get out of my way, fossil!
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Holy.description:
Our elders are to be respected and revered, and never shall we expect them to do hard work.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists older than 65 will not do dumb labor.
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Holy.label: holy
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Respected.description: True wisdom comes only with age, and those who have seen many seasons are to be venerated.
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Respected.label: respected
LanguageData.VME_Expectations_High.description:
Our people are creatures of comfort, even the commoners among us deserve to relax or be pampered from time to time.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Expectations increased by 1 for everyone in the colony, except elite and supreme, which are unaffected for balance reasons.
LanguageData.VME_Expectations_High.label: high
LanguageData.VME_Expectations_Low.description:
The Rim is an inhospitable place. We shouldn't expect a comfy live.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Expectations lowered by 1 for everyone in the colony, except elite and supreme, which are unaffected for balance reasons.
LanguageData.VME_Expectations_Low.label: low
LanguageData.VME_FarmingYield_High.description:
Each vegetable or fruit harvested should be harvested down to the last stem, root, or leaf. Leave not a single bit of produce unharvested.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Farming yield: +10%.
LanguageData.VME_FarmingYield_High.label: high
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.description:
The warmth of ash, the light of embers, scintillating flame is an awesome sight to behold.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists get moods bonuses depending on the number of active fires on the map. Campfires, torches, Stone Campfires from Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Core and Hearths from Vanilla Factions Expanded - Vikings also count.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.description:
There is nothing as disgusting as an out of control fire. The flames shall be avoided by any means necessary, for their destructive power is unmatched.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists get negative moods depending on the number of active fires on the map. Campfires, torches, Stone Campfires from Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Core and Hearths from Vanilla Factions Expanded - Vikings also count.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Abhorrent.description: To quash a sacred flame is to commit an unspeakable sin.
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Preferred.description: There is nothing more exhilarating than extinguishing a dangerous fire.
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Preferred.label: preferred
LanguageData.VME_Fishing_Adept.description:
Our adoration for the water and all life within has led us to employ new and subtle techniques for catching as many fish as possible.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Adept fishermen will be able to catch additional fish from fishing zones. These "adept fish" will be caught 20% of the time in a stack of 10, increasing the overall yield of fishing.
LanguageData.VME_Fishing_Adept.label: adept
LanguageData.VME_Fishing_Forbidden.description: Fish are animals, and as such fishing should be a banned activity.
LanguageData.VME_Fishing_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VME_FungusEating_DontCare.label: don't care
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.description:
A place of refuge and healing is essential for the long-term health of our community. Itâ€™s important to make sure we have open beds and plenty of medicine should the worst come to worst.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists gets mood penalties / bonuses depending on size of hospital rooms found in the map. Only hospital rooms with an impressiveness of "decent" or higher will count for this calculation. Hospitals will need to be clean or colonists will complain too!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.label: required
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Commissar.description: A brave and ruthless military tactician who specializes in leading by means of fear and threats. Capable of executing insubordinate pawns in order to motivate the rest.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Commissar.label: commissar
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_FireKeeper.description: A keeper of sacred flame whose primary job is to control pyres, bonfires, and kilns. Respected unanimously by their disciples, they have no qualms extinguishing fires and followers will respect their decisions to do so. All Firekeepers possess the ability to ignite flame sources and cause an explosion.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_FireKeeper.label: fire keeper
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Fleshcrafter.description: A veritable anatomical expert capable of excising organs from recently deceased cadavers. Because of organ damage and decay only between one and three organs will be harvested at random and the rest of the corpse will be reduced to meat.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Fleshcrafter.label: fleshcrafter
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_InsectoidHerder.description: A talented tamer of insectoids. Through study or natural talent these leaders are capable of immediately understanding and controlling insectoid creatures, however, as a sacred bond they are not allowed to partake in any other kinds of work. Insectoid herders can erect insectoid hives as part of a short ritual.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_InsectoidHerder.label: insectoid herder
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_LeaderSecond.description: A leader who holds the group together and represents your faction in diplomatic interactions.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_LeaderSecond.label: second triumvir
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_LeaderThird.description: A leader who holds the group together and represents your faction in diplomatic interactions.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_LeaderThird.label: third triumvir
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Majordomo.description:
A management specialist, Majordomo is the steward of nobility and overseer of estates. They wield authority to organize, manage, and ensure the seamless operation of every aspect of aristocratic life, but are unable to hold titles themselves. They possess an ability to inspire everyone around them to go an extra mile, at the cost of greatly lowering their recreation.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Gains recreation from any work.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Majordomo.label: majordomo
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Mechacker.description: A brilliant engineer capable of assembling mechanoid effigies. Unlike their lazy counterparts, Mechackers are willing to do all work types. All Mechackers possess the ability to overload and detonate turrets or hostile mechanoids, causing an explosion.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Mechacker.label: mechacker
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Merchant.description: A welcoming and charismatic, though somewhat cutthroat trader, specializes in establishing mercantile routes with other colonies. Can signal for a random friendly faction trade caravan to make a detour directly to the colony every 5 days. Also receives a small bonus to trading prices through sheer charisma.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Merchant.label: merchant
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Nurse.description: A dedicated medical professional able to tend to wounds with surgical precision. Possesses the unique ability to hyperfocus on their doctoring patients in times of mass trauma, temporarily suppressing their needs for rest, recreation, or hunger.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Nurse.label: nurse
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_PartyHost.description: A most jovial hooligan incapable of understanding that not all times can be party time. A party leader is able to throw an amazing party at any time. However, they will find themselves needing about twice the recreation time as the normal person to be happy on a day-to-day basis.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_PartyHost.label: party host
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Patissier.description:
A talented and epicurious provisioner of all things sweet. Capable of deftly altering any variety of meal into a most tantalizing dessert. Remarkably swift at cooking regardless of meal type.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - The pÃ¢tissier receives a +20% Cooking speed bonus.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_Patissier.label: pÃ¢tissier
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Exalted.description: To be infected is to be blessed, and to go long without blessing is regrettable.
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Indifferent.description: Illness is just another fact of life.
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Indifferent.label: indifferent
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Preferred.description: Being sick gives you an excuse to lie down and work less. It's worth it!
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Preferred.label: preferred
LanguageData.VME_Immunity_Enhanced.description: Plague, suffering, pain, these are all but temporary visitors through which my body acts as a divine conduit. Brief will be their respite in my being, for they will bestow themselves to fellow plague children before long.
LanguageData.VME_Immunity_Enhanced.label: enhanced
LanguageData.VME_IncantationPrecept.description: An incantation. A dark chant to appease the eldritch entities that defy all natural laws.
LanguageData.VME_IncantationPrecept.label: incantation
LanguageData.VME_InsectJellyEaten_Despised.descriptio: Insect jelly is a disgusting concept.
LanguageData.VME_InsectJellyEaten_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_InsectJellyEaten_Loved_Classic.descr: Insect jelly is divine ambrosia, a gift from perfect creatures.
LanguageData.VME_InsectJellyEaten_Loved_Classic.label: loved
LanguageData.VME_InsectJellyEaten_Neutral_Classic.des: Insect jelly is smooth, rich and nourishing, even though it has some... questionable origins.
LanguageData.VME_InsectMeatEating_DontCare.descriptio: Insect meat is just another type of meat. There are innumerable cultures in human history with a rich entomophagy tradition.
LanguageData.VME_InsectMeatEating_DontCare.label: don't care
LanguageData.VME_InsectMeatEating_Sacrilegious.descri: Eating the flesh of divine insects is vile and disgusting, even the idea of putting it near your mouth should be met with embarrassment.
LanguageData.VME_InsectMeatEating_Sacrilegious.label: sacrilegious
LanguageData.VME_InsectoidHymnPrecept.description: An insectoid hymn. The ritual will refresh the cooldown of the insectoid herder's "Construct a Nest" ability. If the ritual gets the best possible result it will make any insectoids currently assaulting the colony flee. Except the Black HIve, those want your blood.
LanguageData.VME_InsectoidHymnPrecept.label: insectoid hymn
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Despised.description: Insects are our enemies, a plague that deserves to be exterminated.
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Exalted.description: Insects are not our enemies, only misunderstood and they certainly donâ€™t deserve our aggression.
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.description:
The machinations of old are breath-taking, and their weathering should be viewed as art. It's wonderful to live surrounded by things discarded by others.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Ancient junk buildings can be uninstalled and placed again as needed.
 - Colonists get mood penalties / bonuses depending on amount of ancient junk buildings in a 20 tiles radius around them. Effect checks approximately once every 5 hours.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.label: beautiful
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.description:
Ancient junk reminds us of the tribulations of our forefathers, subject to the eternal struggle of humanity among the stars. We can learn a great deal from studying this discarded tech.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Ancient junk buildings can be uninstalled and placed again as needed.
 - Colonists get moderate mood penalties / bonuses depending on amount of ancient junk buildings in a 20 tiles radius around them. Effect checks approximately once every 5 hours.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.label: preferred
LanguageData.VME_JunkDeconstructionYield_High.descrip:
To throw away that which could be reused is utterly wasteful, every last shred of leather or fragment of steel can be repurposed.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Deconstructing a building returns 100% of its original materials. This also applies to destroying a building (as long as the building produces resources when destroyed), and when failing to construct it.
LanguageData.VME_JunkDeconstructionYield_High.label: high
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Abhorrent.descriptio: Watching a person burn to dead without trying to help is horrible, and should be avoided at all costs.
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Preferred.descriptio: To watch my enemies be burnt in sacred fire elates our kind like nothing else can.
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Preferred.label: preferred
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestCrafter.description:
Our most skilled artisan is our leader, through their keen eye and delicate touch our workshops will sing the song of creation.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - The leader role will periodically be forced upon the highest level crafter in the colony (this will only work if the ideology is the primary one).
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestCrafter.label: best crafter
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestFighter.description: Martial expertise, be it with a blade or spear is a show of strength and courage. Our most talented fighter will be our leader, no questions asked (this will only work if the ideology is the primary one).
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestFighter.label: best fighter
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestPsycaster.description:
We will only be led by one whoâ€™s proven themselves to be our most powerful psyker among us.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - The leader role will periodically be forced upon the highest level psycaster in the colony (this will only work if the ideology is the primary one). Leader role will be assigned to the last pawn who achieved highest psylink level in your colony. Even if the current leader has the same level.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_BestPsycaster.label: best psycaster
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.description:
Our leader should be exalted as a god, to treat them as any less assures our demise.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Opinion of the leader depends on a person's certainty in its ideoligion.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.label: godlike
LanguageData.VME_Leader_HighestTitle.description:
Standing at imperial court is the most significant trait a leader can have.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - The leader role will periodically be forced upon the highest royalty title in the colony (this will only work if the ideology is the primary one). Leader role will be assigned to the last pawn who achieved highest royalty title in your colony. Even if the current leader has the same level.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_HighestTitle.label: highest title
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Moralist.description:
Our leader is a morale bastion, and through them and their divinity we shall flourish.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - The colony's leader can use moralist abilities too.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Moralist.label: moralist
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Three.description:
Itâ€™s vital that we put our trust in the hands of few rather than the hand of one.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Up to three people can be designated as leader.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Three.label: three
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConversion.description: The leader tries to persuade someone into joining your ideoligion.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConversion.label: conversion ritual (leader)
LanguageData.VME_LeadershipChallengePrecept.label: leadership challenge
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Abhorrent.description: Slaughtering an animal to use its skin as apparel is cruel and inhumane.
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Disliked.description: Using animal leathers is something that should be avoided.
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.description:
A place of learning is essential for our community. A nice collection of marvelous tomes and filled shelves will fill our hearts with joy.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists gets mood penalties / bonuses depending on size of library rooms found in the map. Only library rooms with an impressiveness of "decent" or higher will count for this calculation. Libraries will need to be clean or colonists will complain too!
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.label: required
LanguageData.VME_MeatEating_Abhorrent_Strict.descript: Eating meat of any kind is deeply evil. Consuming any animal product is immoral.
LanguageData.VME_MeatEating_Abhorrent_Strict.label: abhorrent (strict)
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Despised.description: Mechanoids are an abomination, a reminder of man's hubris.
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Exalted.description: To destroy a child of machination is a short-sighted and foolish act.
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_Meditation_Exquisite.description: Hear, feel, thinkâ€¦ Beyond meditation, enter trance and surrender yourself to your own soul and those souls around it.
LanguageData.VME_Meditation_Exquisite.label: exquisite
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.description:
The endless sea of stars in our skies will dictate my future, be it benevolent or otherwise.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - After every Divine the Stars ritual, a solar eclipse or an aurora, mood will randomly change between -30 and +30.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.label: dictated by stars
LanguageData.VME_Mood_HighExpectations.description: The whole world is ours to explore and enjoy.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_HighExpectations.label: high spirits
LanguageData.VME_Mood_LowExpectations.description: We are stranded on a lost, forgotten planet on the Rim. Things can hardly get worse.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_LowExpectations.label: low spirits
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Normal.label: normal
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.description:
Empathy is a quality we must all strive to possess. We bear each other's burdens as well as each other's jubilations.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - If the average colony mood is happy, colonists receive a positive thought, and vice versa.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.label: shared
LanguageData.VME_OrganUse_PostMortem.description:
The organs of oneâ€™s being should never go to waste, so long as their vessel is no longer required.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Through the fleshcrafter role can butcher fresh humanoid bodies to acquire fleshcrafted organs.
LanguageData.VME_OrganUse_PostMortem.label: post mortem
LanguageData.VME_OrgyPrecept.description: An orgy. Participants will ignore any sexual preferences during the event's duration.
LanguageData.VME_OrgyPrecept.label: orgy
LanguageData.VME_Pain_DontCare.description: Pain is only in your mind, so long as your spirit remains whole, you are in control of it.
LanguageData.VME_Pain_DontCare.label: don't care
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.description:
Our colony should become our forever home, the more buildings, paths, and lights we can erect the better off weâ€™ll all be.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists gets mood penalties / bonuses depending on amount of buildings on the map. "Building" is a completely enclosed structure with at least 25 tiles size.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.description:
Our colony is only temporary, should we stay it will only be a matter of time before we are unable to defend it, it is better to never gain such comfort.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Farming yield: -10%.
 - Gathering yield: +40%.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_PermitCooldown_Increased.description: Patience is a virtue, and now a necessity, as the cooldown of permits is doubled. Time crawls as the court awaits the next invocation of royal privilege.
LanguageData.VME_PermitCooldown_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_PermitCooldown_Lowered.description: Royalty demands swift action; thus, the cooldown of permits is lessened, allowing for a more rapid response to the ever-changing whims of noble desire.
LanguageData.VME_PermitCooldown_Lowered.label: lowered
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Doubled.description: Every call for aid is a heavy toll, a demand of honor twice the usual rate. Such is the price of urgency, a cost only to be borne when the need is direst.
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Doubled.label: doubled
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Halved.description: The honored have the privilege of calling upon their allies more frequently, their requests for aid met with a nod and a half a cost, easing the burden of leadership.
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Halved.label: halved
LanguageData.VME_PlagueFestivalPrecept.label: plague festival
LanguageData.VME_Power_Desired.description: Craving to be one of the powerful elite is a very understandable desire and should not be looked down upon.
LanguageData.VME_Power_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_Power_Exalted.description: I am righteousness! I am no simple king, I have ascended to that of a god! Bow before me or atone with your life.
LanguageData.VME_Power_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_Power_Preferred.description: Itâ€™s unthinkable to be considered a commoner. I want people to take my word seriously and put forth great effort not to disappoint me.
LanguageData.VME_Power_Preferred.label: preferred
LanguageData.VME_Proselytizing_Forceful.description: If somebody canâ€™t see the error in their ways, then we are not beyond resorting to aggression to show them, itâ€™s an obligation to our creed.
LanguageData.VME_Proselytizing_Forceful.label: forceful
LanguageData.VME_Proselytizing_Never.description:
Everyone has their own truth, and everyone should respect the rights of others to follow their own.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Disables conversion rituals and the convert ability of the moralist role.
LanguageData.VME_Proselytizing_Never.label: never
LanguageData.VME_PsychicSensitivity_Heightened.descri: Reach with your mind to encompass the whole world. Let your mind be a swift weapon of psychic retribution.
LanguageData.VME_PsychicSensitivity_Heightened.label: heightened
LanguageData.VME_PsychicSensitivity_Lowered.descripti: Barricade your mind to all thoughts that arenâ€™t your own. Let your mind be a veritable fortress of unwavering mental constitution.
LanguageData.VME_PsychicSensitivity_Lowered.label: lowered
LanguageData.VME_PsyfocusGain_Doubled.description: By inducing trance on oneself and reaching erudition you cast away the shackles of the physical and find the ability to manipulate the world just as trivial as breathing.
LanguageData.VME_PsyfocusGain_Doubled.label: doubled
LanguageData.VME_Raiding_Abhorrent.description: We worked hard for what we have, we cannot take from the weak as we too were once weak. Doing so is a tremendous shame.
LanguageData.VME_Raiding_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_Raiding_Honorable.description: We display our strength and perseverance through conquest, and in doing so we bring honor to our colony.
LanguageData.VME_Raiding_Honorable.label: honorable
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Discouraged.description: Why would we raise land animals or hunt, waste our time training and butchering them when we can get all the meat we need from the sea?
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Discouraged.label: discouraged
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.description: Keeping animals captive to consume their flesh and their resources is deeply immoral and should be avoided at all costs. Growing our own fruits and vegetables is a much nobler pursuit.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Nomadic.description: A nomad is nothing without their trusty steed. Developing a bond with beasts of burden means traveling this world will never be a lonely endeavour.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Nomadic.label: nomadic
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Disapproved.description:
Recreation is a waste of time.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Colonists get -5 mood for half a day after doing a recreation job.
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Disapproved.label: disapproved
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Fishing.description:
Fishing is one of the most relaxing and fulfilling activities you could possibly spend your free time doing.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Colonists gain recreation when fishing.
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Fishing.label: fishing
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Loved.description:
Fun and games arenâ€™t optional - Enjoy every moment of recreation and make it the best you can for yourself and your friends.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Colonists gain recreation at 50% the speed when using any Joy buildings.
 - Increases by 50% the mood buff acquired by colonists after a party.
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Loved.label: loved
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Normal.description: Recreation is an important part of life.
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Normal.label: normal
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Disliked.description: Titles and crowns, relics of a bygone era, draw ire more than admiration. Those who flaunt their noble status find themselves at the receiving end of equal disdain.
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.description: Those who drape themselves in the vestments of royalty ascend beyond mere mortals. Each step up the ladder of nobility brings greater veneration from the common folk, from a respectful nod for a Yeoman to awestruck reverence for a High Stellarch.
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.label: exalted
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.description: Royal titles are chains that bind freedom, and each title is a shackle more cursed than the last. From Yeoman to High Stellarch, the disdain grows with the weight of the crown, heavy is the head that wears it.
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.label: hated
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Respected.description: Every crown and every title is a symbol of burdens shouldered for the good of all. Regardless of the rank, a title earns a uniform respect, an acknowledgment of the wearer's elevated place in our order.
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Respected.label: respected
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.description: A body marked with scars is disgusting.
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.label: disgusting
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.description: Scars are marks of honor and strength, to be scarred and continue on is nothing short of an incredible act.
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.label: honorable
LanguageData.VME_SkilledLabor_Relaxed.description: Skilled labour should be approached with care and time. Rushing things only leads to sloppy results and unfortunate accidents.
LanguageData.VME_SkilledLabor_Relaxed.label: relaxed
LanguageData.VME_SkilledLabor_Slow.description: Pursuits of skilled labor are meticulous and time-consuming, it is better to focus our attention and efforts elsewhere.
LanguageData.VME_SkilledLabor_Slow.label: slow
LanguageData.VME_SlaveEmancipationPrecept.description: Cast off your shackles, and should you find us suitable, be welcomed within our community as kin and kith alike. Should you find your new home ill-suited for your needs, we wish you a warm, albeit melancholy goodbye.
LanguageData.VME_SlaveEmancipationPrecept.label: slave emancipation
LanguageData.VME_Slavery_Forbidden.description: Participating in slave trade is an absolutely vile idea. The only reason to purchase a slave is with intent to immediately free them. Moreso, those who struggled through enslavement deserve our compassion and respect.
LanguageData.VME_Slavery_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VME_SlaveTrading_OnlyBuying.description: Only buying slaves is justifiable, after which we should provide them amicable amounts of lodging and consideration within our colony. By selling a slave one leaves their fate up to the good faith of their buyer, a very unwise decision.
LanguageData.VME_SlaveTrading_OnlyBuying.label: only buying
LanguageData.VME_SocialInteractions_Disallowed.descri: Chatter between those of our creed is forbidden. We seek to achieve a greater understanding through a venere of silence and secrecy, an oath few outsiders can comprehend.
LanguageData.VME_SocialInteractions_Disallowed.label: disallowed
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Craved.description:
Desserts and treats shouldnâ€™t be withheld, sugary confections should be eaten at least every couple days.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Bear in mind this precept has a minimum expectation required. Moderate expectations or higher are needed for the "Desserts" need to show up.

 - Desserts that increase the need: Chocolate (10%), Simple dessert (15%), Fine dessert (25%), Lavish dessert (35%), Gourmet dessert (50%)
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Craved.label: craved
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Impartial.description: Sweets arenâ€™t that great, they can easily be left behind.
LanguageData.VME_Sweets_Impartial.label: impartial
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_Abhorrent.description: There can be nothing more disgusting in this world than wearing the clothing used by a dead person.
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_Disapproved.descripti: Wearing a dead person's apparel is quite disgusting.
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_Disapproved.label: disapproved
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_DontCare.description: Clothing soaked in blood or bits shouldnâ€™t dissuade one from covering themselves and making use of what would otherwise be worn away by time.
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_DontCare.label: don't care
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_Abhorrent.descriptio: Ratty clothes are disgusting and should be discarded as soon as possible.
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_Disapproved.descript: Wearing ratty clothes is uncomfortable and should be avoided.
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_Disapproved.label: disapproved
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_DontCare.description: We have bigger concerns to address than holes in our clothes, let's not waste our valuable time fretting or lamenting about such trivialities.
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_DontCare.label: don't care
LanguageData.VME_TendQuality_Increased.description: Our people are heavily encouraged to be diligent about healing and caring for each other. If we canâ€™t take care of each other, how could we hope to survive this harsh world?
LanguageData.VME_TendQuality_Increased.label: increased
LanguageData.VME_TitleInheritance_Inherited.descripti: Nobility flows through blood, as titles pass from the fallen to their kin. A parent's demise elevates the firstborn, inheriting the mantle of leadership.
LanguageData.VME_TitleInheritance_Inherited.label: inherited
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.description: Our colony, like it or not, is a business. Going too long without a sale is stressful, but making a hefty profit is veritably euphoric.
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.label: required
LanguageData.VME_TradingFairPrecept.label: trading fair
LanguageData.VME_TradingPrice_Improved.description: Everything has a price, and it just so happens our kind are particularly persuasive when it comes to proving that to others.
LanguageData.VME_TradingPrice_Improved.label: improved
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.description: Itâ€™s a simple-minded claim that this planet doesnâ€™t have exotic and beautiful lands to appreciate and immerse oneself in. Traveling this world should be a priority.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.label: desired
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.description: Every moment spent away from home is another moment running away from the inevitable. Time spent traveling can be spent more wisely at home building and defending it.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.label: despised
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Abhorrent.description:
To shed blood or break bone is barbaric and disgusting. 

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists will receive a substantial negative mood if they are forced to attack non-hostile humanoid targets.
 - The only mental break allowed is psychotic wander.
 - All drafted colonists will undraft if an attacking enemy starts fleeing.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Acceptable.description: Aggression is just a fact of life.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Acceptable.label: acceptable
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Disapproved.description:
We should avoid harming innocents if possible. Attacking a harmless person is immoral. 

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists will receive a negative mood if they are forced to attack non-hostile humanoid targets.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Disapproved.label: disapproved
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Honorable.description:
Harming innocents is an honorable necessity on the Rim, it proves our strength and our resolve.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists will receive a positive mood if they are forced to attack non-hostile humanoid targets.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Honorable.label: honorable
LanguageData.VME_ViolentConversionPrecept.description: Infidels must either join our cause, or their skulls shall be caved in with a thousand hammers.
LanguageData.VME_ViolentConversionPrecept.label: violent conversion
LanguageData.VME_WickerManBurningPrecept.label: wicker man burning
LanguageData.VME_WoodcuttingYield_High.description:
Lumber is infinitely useful, not even stumps go to waste when our kind is in charge.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Woodcutting yield: +10%.
LanguageData.VME_WoodcuttingYield_High.label: high
